steps.title: <ui-icon name="map"></ui-icon> View Switcher & Gestures
steps.text:
Toggle layout views dynamically!
Layout Types
• Tree - Parent-child hierarchy.
• Graph - Visual dependency map.
• Board - Column stages workflow.
• Timeline - Sprints & Gantt roadmaps.
Pro-Tip
Drag and drop rows in the Tree view to quickly change parent-child hierarchies, or use Ctrl/Cmd+click for Bulk Edit.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="search"></ui-icon> Advanced Filters
steps.text:
Narrow down your workspace instantly!
Search & Filter Options
• Search items by text, title, or ID.
• Filter by Sprint, State, Assignee, or Tags.
• Cycle sort order by priority or ID.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="star"></ui-icon> Filter Followed Items
steps.text:
Focus on items you are tracking!
Toggle Star Filter
Click the star button to instantly filter the active view to show only work items you have subscribed to.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="undo"></ui-icon> Undo & Redo
steps.text:
Revert mistakes in one click!
Keyboard Shortcuts
• Ctrl + Z - Reverts parent-child shifts, status changes, or description edits.
• Ctrl + Y - Redoes the last undone action.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="settings"></ui-icon> Display & Settings
steps.text:
Manage application display and connections!
Settings Options
Configure theme switching, timezone contexts, auto-refresh intervals, custom reaction emojis, or DevOps connections.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="settings"></ui-icon> General Settings
steps.text:
Control settings and preferences!
Available Settings
Theme, UI Scaling, Auto-refresh rates, Timezone offset, and active Work Hours.
Settings Help
Hover over the icon next to any setting label to read detailed tooltip popovers!

steps.title: <ui-icon name="layout"></ui-icon> Customize Layout
steps.text:
Tailor the layout to your project!
Layout Customization
• Reorder or toggle visibility of toolbar buttons.
• Pick columns for Tree, Board, and Timeline views.
• Select which fields are displayed on cards.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="smile"></ui-icon> Custom Reactions
steps.text:
Personalize comment reactions!
Reaction Assets
Select custom emojis or upload images to use as activity comment reactions instead of the defaults.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="book"></ui-icon> Interactive Tours
steps.text:
Refresh your knowledge anytime!
Feature Tours
Open this list to replay any tutorial, check your completion progress, or reset the seen history entirely.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="key"></ui-icon> DevOps Connection
steps.text:
Configure your project context!
Connection details
Manage organization URLs, project names, PAT tokens, or OAuth credentials to establish a secure link with Azure DevOps.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="paperclip"></ui-icon> File Attachments
steps.text:
Upload files and logs instantly!
How to attach
• Click this clip icon to choose files.
• Paste images from your clipboard directly into descriptions.
• Drag and drop files from explorer anywhere on the panel.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="settings"></ui-icon> Customize Panel
steps.text:
Hide or reorder detail fields!
Sidebar Layouts
Customize which fields are visible on this panel. The layout configuration is automatically saved per work item type (e.g. Bug layout vs Epic layout).

steps.title: <ui-icon name="link"></ui-icon> ADO Link & Navigation
steps.text:
Jump straight to the cloud portal!
Link Options
• Left Click: Jump directly to the Azure DevOps web page for this item.
• Right/Split click: Copy the direct ADO item link to your clipboard.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="maximize"></ui-icon> Fullscreen Editor
steps.text:
Write documentation comfortably!
Fullscreen Mode
Toggle fullscreen editor mode to write description documentation, edit markdown text, or read long descriptions.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="star"></ui-icon> Local Subscriptions (Follow)
steps.text:
Stay updated on key work items!
Local Alerts
Atlas monitors subscribed items in the background and sends desktop alerts on changes. It does not register you on the ADO server, avoiding spam emails!

steps.title: <ui-icon name="copy"></ui-icon> Dynamic Fields
steps.text:
Fields adapt to your work item type!
Data Sync
Title, State, Assignee, and other detail fields sync immediately with Azure DevOps and change dynamically based on the current item.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="trending-up"></ui-icon> Activity & Time-in-State
steps.text:
Track transition times and comments!
State Transitions
Analyze how long work items spend in each state (e.g., Active, Resolved) to identify bottlenecks.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="message-square"></ui-icon> Activity Actions
steps.text:
Take actions directly from the sidebar!
Quick Actions
• Create child items in one click.
• Post markdown comments.
• Toggle full discussion history pane.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="plus"></ui-icon> Nested Logical Groups
steps.text:
Click Add Field to append rule rows.
Nesting Logic
You can nest groups! Combine multiple conditions with AND or OR selectors to construct complex, multi-level logic queries.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="settings"></ui-icon> Flip Operators
steps.text:
Click the operator chip (e.g. =) to flip it directly!
Hierarchical Filtering
Use the UNDER operator to search Area Path sub-trees or check recursive parent-child hierarchies (e.g., matching all descendants of Epic 123).

steps.title: <ui-icon name="sparkles"></ui-icon> Identity & Value Macros
steps.text:
Avoid hardcoding values using smart macros!
Common Macros
• @me - Matches the active user (ideal for Assignee field).
• @empty - Matches items with blank or empty fields.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="calendar"></ui-icon> Date & System Macros
steps.text:
Filter by timeframes or project scope dynamically!
Advanced Macros
• @today - Matches current date. Supports offsets like @today - 7.
• @currentiteration - Points to the current sprint.
• @project - Refers to the current project context.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="eye"></ui-icon> Live Results Preview
steps.text:
Verify your filter instantly!
Live Sidebar
The sidebar runs your query in the background, rendering matching work items and showing the match count in real-time as you type!

steps.title: <ui-icon name="star"></ui-icon> Only Followed Items
steps.text:
Focus only on what matters to you!
Quick Toggle
Toggle this switch to quickly restrict the entire advanced query results to only items you are currently following.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="save"></ui-icon> Saved Presets
steps.text:
Save your complex queries!
Preserving Rules
Click Save to store the entire configuration under a custom name, keeping it reusable for future sessions.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="folder"></ui-icon> Filter Manager
steps.text: Click Manage to open the control window. From there you can delete, share, or import/export configurations.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="folder"></ui-icon> Saved Filters Tab
steps.text:
Organize your preset library!
Available Actions
• Click a saved filter name to apply it instantly.
• Click to copy it to the clipboard.
• Click to share or download the config.
• Click trash to delete obsolete configurations.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="copy"></ui-icon> Import / Export Tab
steps.text:
Share filters easily!
JSON Import/Export
• Paste JSON directly or upload a .json file.
• Click Apply & Execute to run a pasted filter immediately without saving it to your presets!
